q: Do you prefer typing or handwriting?
examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi so sánh sở thích giữa hai phương thức ghi chép. Bạn nên tập trung vào các tiêu chí như: tốc độ (speed), sự tiện lợi (convenience), cảm xúc (personal touch), và tính ứng dụng (practicality). Sử dụng các cấu trúc so sánh hơn/kém hoặc cấu trúc 'I'm more of a... person' để trả lời tự nhiên hơn. Đừng quên nêu ưu điểm của cả hai để mở rộng câu trả lời.

band7.text: I definitely prefer typing because it's much faster and more efficient for work. I can easily edit my mistakes and organize my thoughts. However, for personal things like birthday cards or journaling, I still enjoy handwriting as it feels more personal.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, có lý do rõ ràng và sự đối chiếu giữa hai phương thức.

band8.text: I’m definitely leaning towards typing for the vast majority of my tasks. It’s simply indispensable for productivity, especially since my handwriting has become somewhat illegible over the years. That said, I still cherish the act of writing by hand for creative brainstorming; I find that the physical connection between the pen and paper helps me think more clearly.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao (leaning towards, indispensable, illegible, cherish, brainstorming). Cấu trúc câu tự nhiên và mạch lạc.

band9.text: In this digital era, I’ve predominantly transitioned to typing for almost all professional and academic purposes due to its sheer efficiency and ease of archiving. However, I’ve retained a strong affinity for handwriting when it comes to reflective journaling or personal correspondence. There’s an undeniable tactile satisfaction and a sense of intimacy in longhand that digital fonts simply cannot replicate. So, while typing is my go-to for utility, handwriting remains my favorite for emotional expression.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ tinh tế (predominantly, transitioned, archiving, retained, affinity, tactile, intimacy, longhand, replicate). Cách lập luận sâu sắc.

v.example: I'm leaning towards typing because it saves a lot of time.
A keyboard is indispensable for office workers today.
His handwriting is so messy it's almost illegible.
We had a productive brainstorming session this morning.
The area is predominantly occupied by students.
Digital documents are much easier to archive than paper ones.

v.meaning: vẫn còn sự yêu thích/gắn bó với
v.example: Even though I use a Kindle, I retain an affinity for physical books.

v.meaning: sự hài lòng về mặt xúc giác (khi chạm vào/cầm nắm)
v.example: Typing on a mechanical keyboard gives a great tactile satisfaction.
A handwritten letter carries a sense of intimacy that an email lacks.

v.meaning: viết tay (theo kiểu đầy đủ cụ từ)
v.example: I still prefer to take notes in longhand during lectures.
It's hard to replicate the feeling of writing with a fountain pen.
The new system significantly improved our work efficiency.

v.meaning: thư từ (giao dịch qua lời viết/email)
v.example: I handle all the business correspondence via email.
Typing is purely utilitarian for most people.
Handwriting can be very expressive of a person's character.
Some schools still promote manual writing in early education.
The QWERTY keyboard layout is the most common.

v.meaning: gõ máy tính không nhìn phím
v.example: Learning touch typing helped me work much faster.
I scribbled her phone number on a scrap of paper.
We are trying to digitalize all our old records.
The old typewriter had a certain clunkiness that was quite charming.
Typing allows you to use the spell-check feature automatically.
Font size is important for the legibility of the document.
He loves the smooth ink flow of a good fountain pen.
She took a course to improve her English calligraphy.

v.meaning: viết nhật ký/ghi chép hàng ngày
v.example: Journaling is a great way to process your emotions.
The versatility of digital text makes it superior for work.
A laptop makes your work more portable.
It's always handy to have a pen and paper by the bed.
Typing makes every letter clearly distinguishable.
I need to check the word count for my essay.
Typing allows you to edit and rephrase on the fly.
Once you learn to type, it becomes muscle memory.
Music is often difficult to notate by hand.

v.meaning: nét đặc trưng riêng/sự chân thành
v.example: A handwritten note adds a lovely personal touch to a gift.
Typing is much more speedy than writing longhand.

v.meaning: lao động chân tay/làm thủ công
v.example: Handwriting can feel like manual labor after a few pages.

v.meaning: sự bế tắc trong suy nghĩ
v.example: Switching to handwriting sometimes helps clear a mental block.
I use a stylus to draw on my tablet.
I usually type the final version but write the first draft.
Making revisions is far easier on a computer.

v.word: at the push of a button
v.meaning: rất dễ dàng (chỉ bằng một nút bấm)
v.example: Information is available at the push of a button.

v.meaning: trở thành bản năng/thói quen tự nhiên
v.example: Typing has become second nature to most millennials.
I’m a bit old school; I still like paper planners.
Handwritten letters are a classic way to keep in touch.

v.meaning: cắt và dán (thao tác văn bản)
v.example: The cut and paste feature is a lifesaver for writers.
I'll type this up and save it for later use.
Modern offices are trying to reduce the amount of paperwork.
Every email you type contributes to your digital footprint.
Typing makes it easier to keep your emails short and to the point.
